$comment: Per-assembly line-coverage targets (%). In CI the check runs report-only (check-coverage-thresholds.ps1 -WarnOnly): assemblies in 'assemblies' below their target are surfaced as warnings but do NOT fail the build; assemblies in 'warnings' are a softer tier, also non-fatal. Run without -WarnOnly (e.g. locally) the script gates (exits non-zero on a missed target). 'globalThreshold' of 0 means only the explicitly listed assemblies are tracked.
